notes: Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad 'sensitive / easily affected' sense for people, skin, devices, materials, or topics; not split into a separate emotional-only concept. CEFR set editorially to B1 on 2026-03-21.

de.definition: Reagiert schnell oder stark auf Berührung, Kritik, Hitze, Licht oder andere Einflüsse.
de.usage_note: Kann sich auf Personen, Haut, Geräte, Materialien oder Themen beziehen.
examples: Nach wenig Sonne wird ihre Haut sofort rot.

it.definition: Che reagisce facilmente o con forza a contatto, critiche, calore, luce o altri stimoli.
it.usage_note: Può riferirsi a persone, pelle, dispositivi, materiali o temi.
examples: Dopo poco sole, la sua pelle diventa subito rossa.

en.definition: Quick to react strongly to touch, criticism, heat, light, or other influences.
en.usage_note: Can describe people, skin, devices, materials, or topics.
examples: After a short time in the sun, her skin turns red right away.
